data.title: Jeremiah's Italian Ice Launches First-Ever National Jelati Day on April 18
data.description: Residents in Orlando, Florida are invited to participate in National Jelati Day, a new event launched by Jeremiah's Italian Ice on April 8, 2026. As part of the celebration, fans can "Scoop Up A Free Treat" and enjoy the brand's signature layered dessert. This marks the first time the company is hosting this event, aiming to give back to its loyal customers.

data.title: Mill Creek Announces Start of Preleasing at Modera Walsh Heights
data.description: A community in Aledo, Texas, recently celebrated the unveiling of the second phase of development in the Fort Worth-area master-planned community of Mill Creek. This announcement was made on April 8, 2026, by Mill Creek Residential, a renowned developer that focuses on upscale rental housing nationwide. The community members and stakeholders gathered to mark this milestone in the residential project which has garnered significant attention.

data.title: PowerBank Signs LOI with Modular Data Center Company Nodiac.ai, Unlocking Potential Additional Revenue from Existing Energy Assets
data.description: A Letter of Intent signifies PowerBank's strategic move into the expanding AI infrastructure market. The modular data center sector is forecasted to surge from approximately $29 billion USD to $80 billion USD by 2030. North America is expected to dominate with a 41% market share. The founding team of Nodiac boasts a collective background of over $26 billion USD in experience.

data.title: New Open-Access Patient Library from University of Arizona Andrew Weil Center for Integrative Medicine Brings Whole-Person Health Resources to Clinicians and the Public
data.description: A collection of resources for clinicians has expanded rapidly, now offering 50 handouts within two months, with plans to increase to 100 by the year's end. These evidence-based materials focus on whole-person integrative medicine and are accessible for free to providers and the general public across the country. Located in Tucson, Arizona, the initiative aims to enhance access to comprehensive information on integrative health practices.

data.title: The AI Journal Launches New Report: Data Centres - Exploring the Epicentres of a Connected World
data.description: In London on April 8, 2026, The AI Journal unveiled its newest detailed report titled "Data Centres – Exploring the Epicentres of a Connected World." This report provides a thorough analysis of the critical infrastructure supporting the current digital economy, highlighting how it influences the future of the global landscape. This comprehensive report delves into crucial aspects such as the number of data centers worldwide, their impact on digital connectivity, and their role in shaping various industries. The unveiling of this report signifies a significant step towards understanding the pivotal role data centers play in driving technological advancements and connectivity worldwide.

data.title: Experian UK&I strengthens its leading digital verification capabilities with the addition of Konfir
data.description: Experian, a global data and technology company, recently expanded its verification capabilities in the UK by introducing Konfir. Verification poses challenges for numerous consumers during important life events. Whether individuals are verifying income, employment status, or applying for financial services, they often face slow and manual verification processes. These conventional methods lead to delays and inconvenience for customers expecting efficient digital experiences. Through Konfir, Experian aims to streamline and enhance the verification process for individuals in the UK.

data.title: Earnings Scheduled For April 8, 2026
data.description: Several companies are set to report their earnings before the bell today. Beasley Broadcast Group (BBGI) is expected to provide its fourth-quarter earnings update. RPM International (RPM) is projected to report earnings of $0.36 per share with revenue hitting $1.55 billion. Delta Air Lines (DAL) is anticipated to announce earnings of $0.62 per share, with revenue reaching $14.89 billion. Evotec (EVO) is also expected to release its quarterly earnings, with estimates pegged at $0.02 per share on revenue of $253.35 million. Nurix Therapeutics (NRIX) is estimated to report a quarterly loss of $0.76 per share. For more details, the full story is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Women in HVACR to host regional meeting in Houston in May
data.description: Englewood, Colorado - April 8, 2026 - A two-day event called Step Into Your Power is set to take place, aimed at bringing together industry professionals for networking opportunities and leadership development. Women in HVACR (WHVACR), a nonprofit organization focused on empowering women in the heating, ventilation, air conditioning, and refrigeration industry, will be organizing the event. The event is expected to attract a large number of participants looking to connect with like-minded individuals and enhance their leadership skills in the industry.

data.title: Univar Solutions Selected as North American Distributor for Genu-in Collagen Ingredients
data.description: Partnership enhances supply of cutting-edge collagen technologies for food, beverage, and nutraceutical clients, fostering advancements in the expanding health and wellness industry. The collaboration, headquartered in Downers Grove, Illinois, was announced on April 8, 2026. This partnership involves Univar Solutions LLC, a key player in the field, and aims to cater to the increasing demand in this sector.

data.title: Cardinal Plumbing Heating & Air shares water-saving tips ahead of Earth Day
data.description: Area professionals have shared tips on cost-effective changes that can help decrease water bills and minimize waste in homes. Based in Northern Virginia, Cardinal Plumbing Heating & Air is advocating for the adoption of eco-friendly plumbing improvements. This initiative aims to assist homeowners in reducing their environmental impact, with the potential to save significant amounts on expenses related to water usage. Residents are urged to explore options for upgrading their plumbing systems in order to promote sustainability while also benefiting financially.

data.title: Solgaard Appoints Travel Gear Industry Veteran Rob Cooper As President
data.description: A renowned brand in premium luggage and travel gear design, Solgaard, has named Rob Cooper as its President to drive the next stage of growth. The appointment of Cooper, a former President of TUMI, was revealed on April 8, 2026, in New York. Solgaard focuses on sustainable travel gear and accessories, and aims to leverage Cooper's expertise to propel its expansion. The transition is in effect immediately, signaling a strategic move for Solgaard as it progresses in the market.
